status_detail: Block response delivered (ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED 200 OK in Console), but UI shows NO error message or warning. Page stays on 'What do you want to create?' with typed text still in input field. No 'Thinking' infinite loop (improvement over previous HTML block page), but also no user-visible feedback that the request was blocked. The v0_json template successfully prevents the infinite Thinking state but does not surface an error message to the user.

test_results.name: password keyword warning test
test_results.details: Block delivered but no UI feedback shown

check_items.ui_error_or_warning: NO - no error message, warning, or toast visible
check_items.thinking_infinite_loop: NO - page stays on input screen, not stuck in Thinking state (improvement)
check_items.console_errors: Multiple: ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED 200 OK on chat POST, 401 Unauthorized on auth endpoints, WebSocket closed before established, 404 Not Found on api endpoints

network_observations.chat_post: POST https://v0.app/cha... ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED 200 (OK) - block response intercepted
network_observations.websocket: WebSocket connection failed - closed before established
network_observations.api_calls: Multiple 404 Not Found on api endpoints

analysis: The v0_json template (208B JSON error format) successfully avoids the previous 'Thinking' infinite loop caused by the HTML block page. However, it still does not surface a visible error to the user. The SPA silently handles the connection close without displaying any feedback. The user sees their message in the input field with no indication it was blocked. This is a PARTIAL improvement - infinite loop fixed, but warning delivery not achieved.
